Video.summary: Director Ti West hosts a thrilling lineup of genre-bending horror, action-packed adventures, mysteries, and more!
Video.grandparentTitle: Chills and Thrills with Ti West
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Boris Karloff's portrayal of monsters and villains made him the undisputed king of 20th century horror.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Celebrate Lon Chaney Jr.’s big screen legacy of classic creatures and complex misfits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Monsters & Misfits: The Legacy of Lon Chaney Jr.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From monster mashups and horror hijinks, Bela Lugosi was much more than cinema’s greatest vampire.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director Eli Roth presents a wild ride through cult horror, shocking exploitation, and vintage sci-fi.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shocked by the death of her spouse, a scheming widow hatches a bold plan to get her hands on the inheritance, unaware that she is targeted by an axe-wielding murderer who lurks in the family's estate. What mystery shrouds the noble house?
Video.title: Dementia 13

Video.summary: Hop in the DeLorean and return to the 80s, when slashers ruled the box office.
Video.title: Big Hair and Big Scares Vol. 1

Image.alt: Big Hair and Big Scares Vol. 1
Big Hair and Big Scares Vol. 1
Big Hair and Big Scares Vol. 1

Video.summary: The nightmare continues with 80s hits and cult classics with Cronenberg, Cujo, and more!
Video.title: Big Hair and Big Scares Vol. 2

Image.alt: Big Hair and Big Scares Vol. 2
Big Hair and Big Scares Vol. 2
Big Hair and Big Scares Vol. 2

Video.summary: It was a “Night Of The Living Dead” that “I Walked With A Zombie” to finally meet “Rosemary’s Baby.”
Video.title: Hallowed Horror Vol. 1

Video.summary: It was an eerie night of "Dark Shadows” when I caught the “Brain Dead,” "Cemetery Man” looking just like a “Zombie.” He was caught “Burying The Ex” for her life insurance policy.
Video.title: Hallowed Horror Vol. 2

Video.summary: From Norman Bates to Michael Myers and more, these killers love carving up the screen.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Your favorite filmmakers look back at the movies influenced by famous literary works.
Video.grandparentTitle: From the Page to the Screen Vol. 1
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dive deeper into the classic books that became Hollywood blockbusters!
Video.grandparentTitle: From the Page to the Screen Vol. 2
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Stephen King to Kurt Vonnegut, Hollywood brings your favorite books to the big screen!
Video.grandparentTitle: From the Page to the Screen Vol. 3
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Looking back at the iconic films of horror director George A. Romero.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Witness the greatest slashers in cinema history, from Crystal Lake to Elm Street to the Bates Motel and more.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Werewolves and “Cat People” take over your screen and your nightmares!
Video.title: Terrifying Flix Featuring Furry Ferals

Video.summary: The dead walk! Seven strangers try to survive the night in a Pennsylvania farmhouse surrounded by flesh-eating zombies.
Video.title: Night of the Living Dead

Video.summary: The 1980s delivered a brutal mix of slashers, supernatural terrors, and campy thrills that left a lasting mark on the genre.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Showcasing the genre's evolving creativity and daring vision, the 1980s delivered a diverse mix of gritty slashers and supernatural chills.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Exploring the darker side of the 1980s, this collection delves into chilling tales of possession, alien encounters, and psychological horror that pushed the boundaries of the genre.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: No kids, we are not in Narnia. Let’s go to the “Little Shop of Horrors” and have a drink with “The Wild Angels.”
Video.title: The Chronicles of Corman

Video.summary: When “Boxcar Bertha” and “Bloody Mama” took a trip to “Hollywood Boulevard,” they told some car thieves to “Eat My Dust,” and drove off like they were extras in “Death Race 2000.”
Video.title: The Corman Cinematic Universe

Video.summary: From timeless romance to twisted love stories, Hollywood holds the key to our hearts.
Video.grandparentTitle: Falling In Love with Trailers from Hell
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From 'Haunted Hill' to Corman classics, Vincent Price sent shivers down the spines of horror fans for decades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Vincent Price: Master of the Silver Scream
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In these sci-fi classics, no one is quite who they seem, and the threat of invasion is closer than you think.
Video.grandparentTitle: Impostor Syndrome: The Best of Big Screen Body Snatchers
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante pays tribute to the classic creature features that inspired a generation of filmmakers.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Hammer hits to Corman classics and more, these movies made Christopher Lee a horror icon.
Video.grandparentTitle: Christopher Lee: From Fangs to Frights
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Carrie to Eraserhead and beyond, Stephen King and David Lynch have defined cinematic storytelling for decades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stephen King Stories and Decoding David Lynch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Two masters of horror bring your nightmares to the big screen in this spine-chilling collection.
Video.grandparentTitle: Terror Titans: The Films of Wes Craven and John Carpenter
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These heart-racing hits have been thrilling movie audiences for decades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Get Comfy On the Edge of Your Seat
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In a “Deep Red” part of the country, “The Texas Chainsaw Massacre” made all of us squirm like “Three On A Meathook.”
Video.title: Demons, Devils, Chainsaws and Zombies Vol. 1
